dct_title_s: Amplissima Ucraniae Regio, Palatinatus Kioviensem et Braclaviensem complectens, cum adjacentibus Provinciis : /b juxta recentißimam designationem aeri incisa arte et sumtibus, /c Tobiae Conradi Lotteri, geographi Augustae Vindel
dct_description_sm: Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian
Bar scales in upper right: "Milliaria Ucranica 13 in uno Gradu", "Milliaria Pollonica 20 in uno Gradu", "Milliaria Germanica 15 in uno Gradu", and "Milliaria Moscovitica 80 in uno Gradu"
2 decorative cartouches in upper left and upper right, each showing pastoral scenes
"Cum Gratia et Privil. S.R.I. Vicariatus, in partib Rheni, Svevice, et Juris Franconici." below title cartouche in upper left
